issues.claim: Analog not reconstructible from chapter alone
issues.objection: Removed-verse test for 7.23: if 7.23 were removed from the source pack, the chapter alone would not produce this specific engineering analog. Tags (essence-vs-implementation, long-term-thinking, first-principles) anchor on this verse's specific claim. This verse is sharp and operationally robust (per chapter-7 thesis: STRONG operational analog).

notes: Removed-verse test for 7.23: analog is anchored on this verse's specific structural claim, not on chapter-level material alone. PASS.
